headline: HSBC Joins UK Digital Securities Sandbox Amid 20 Participants

article.title: HSBC wins Bank of England approval to enter Digital Securities Sandbox
article.summary: The Bank of England approved HSBC Orion to go live in its Digital Securities Sandbox, with the first Digital Gilt Instrument transaction expected in the first quarter of 2027.

headline: SBI Acquires Coinhako After MAS Nod

article.title: SBI acquires Singaporean crypto platform Coinhako after MAS approval
article.summary: SBI Holdings received regulatory approval to acquire a majority stake in Singapore-based crypto exchange Coinhako as it expands into stablecoins, onchain finance and tokenized assets.

headline: Chips Stocks Plunge 20% as AI Rally Loses 50%

article.title: Chips Stocks Sink Into Bear Market as 105% AI Rally Fizzles
article.summary: A closely-watched index of semiconductor stocks is set to fall into a bear market, unwinding a chunk of the blistering memory-led rally that saw the gauge more than double in just three months.

headline: Chip Stocks Plunge 10% Amid AI Selloff

article.title: Chip Stocks Poised for Bear Market in AI Unwind: Markets Wrap
article.summary: A selloff in chipmakers gathered pace on Friday, driving the group that has led this year’s stock rally toward a bear market on worries that the artificial-intelligence spending spree is becoming harder to justify.
